ab_test_evaluation.variable: Caption style: provocative question vs ambient statement
ab_test_evaluation.variant_a: Provocative question format (e.g., 'Am I your type?', 'which angle tho?')
ab_test_evaluation.variant_b: Ambient statement format (e.g., 'golden hour hits different', '.@grok put me in a bikini')
ab_test_evaluation.directional_signal: Variant B (ambient statement) shows marginally higher average engagement (2.5 vs 2.0) but with only 2 data points per variant, this is not statistically meaningful. Sample too small to conclude. Recommendation: extend test with the next round of content posting. Competitor data strongly validates BOTH styles at scale (@imrubyreid 'lord have mercy...' = 21,948 likes ambient; @IsabellaCruz_47 'Rate me from 1 to 10' = 20,522 likes question) — the format itself is not the limiting factor at our current stage.
ab_test_evaluation.action: Extend A/B test — design new A/B structure in tomorrow's strategy with same variable, using Mar 12 content plan posts as next data batch once they are approved and posted.
